prompt: Create a vertical cinematic portrait of a young woman standing beside a tall old-fashioned window in warm golden-hour sunlight, viewed from behind and slightly in profile as she turns her head toward the light. She has long dark wavy hair loosely tied back with soft flyaway strands. She wears a sheer ivory romantic blouse or dress with translucent puff sleeves, an open back, delicate lace-up ties down the spine, and a ruffled high collar tied at the neck. The scene is an intimate vintage interior with beige walls, a large multi-pane wooden window on the left, gauzy curtains, and hazy dust particles floating in the sunbeam. Use strong backlighting from the upper left, soft lens flare circles, glowing rim light on the hair and shoulders, warm amber tones, shallow depth of field, dreamy film grain, and a nostalgic analog photography look. Compose the subject on the right half of the frame with the window filling the left half; crop from mid-thigh to above the head in a 9:16 aspect ratio. Keep the face turned away or softly obscured by light and shadow, with no readable text, no modern objects, and no watermark.
